build.beforeBuildCommand: echo 'Using web app wrapper - no build needed'

bundle.copyright: Copyright © 2025 SHOTIQ AI. All rights reserved.
bundle.longDescription: Professional basketball shooting form analysis using computer vision and AI.

security.csp: default-src 'self' https://app.shotiqai.com https://*.shotiqai.com; frame-src https://app.shotiqai.com https://*.shotiqai.com; connect-src 'self' https://app.shotiqai.com https://*.shotiqai.com https:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https:; img-src 'self' data: https:; media-src 'self' https:;
